message:
feat(tests): expand integration test coverage across attestation, budget, capability, hook, law, mock seam, and receipt verification suites

Major test expansions (2000+ new lines):
- attested_execution_cell_edge_cases.rs: updated all test helpers
  to use the new attest() signature with explicit issued_at_ns;
  added tampered-metadata and cross-root rejection tests.
- attested_execution_cell_integration.rs: updated cell lifecycle
  integration tests for the new attestation API.
- budget_propagation_contract_integration.rs: added ~300 lines of
  budget boundary propagation and consumption tests.
- frankenlab_harness_migration_integration.rs: added ~170 lines of
  harness migration lifecycle tests.
- frankenlab_release_gate_promotion_integration.rs: added ~200 lines
  of release gate promotion and demotion tests.
- frx_lockstep_oracle_integration.rs: added oracle error context
  validation tests.
- hook_effect_fallback_contract_integration.rs: added ~240 lines of
  hook fallback chain and priority resolution tests.
- law_proof_refutation_integration.rs: added ~210 lines of law proof
  and refutation cycle tests.
- mock_seam_guardrail_integration.rs: added ~330 lines of mock seam
  boundary guardrail validation tests.
- outcome_capability_narrowing_integration.rs: added ~210 lines of
  capability token narrowing and revocation tests.
- receipt_verifier_pipeline.rs and receipt_verifier_pipeline_integration.rs:
  refactored receipt verification tests for pipeline restructuring.
- regexp_deterministic_engine_integration.rs: minor test update.
- .beads/issues.jsonl: updated bead status tracking entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
